scope: Pass B review (already_full): Senseforce's entire documented public API surface is a single element-by-id request family (per manual.senseforce.io/manual/sf-platform/public-api -- 'you need the ID of the element you want to request', and 'get the results of predefined datasets') plus a separate script-execution endpoint for a DIFFERENT element type (published Senseforce scripts, not datasets). The 1 legacy-parity read stream (dataset records for ONE configured dataset_id) is the entirety of the dataset-element surface; no dataset-listing/discovery endpoint, no dataset-metadata/column-schema endpoint, and no write/mutation endpoint of any kind are documented anywhere in the public API manual -- Senseforce's public API is read-only BY DESIGN (it exists to let external tools pull already-built dataset/script results out of the platform, not to manage platform configuration).

excluded.reason: executes a published Senseforce SCRIPT (a distinct element type from datasets, addressed by its own script_id, accepting a ScriptFilters body) and returns its computed result set; a fundamentally different resource model from the single configured dataset this bundle reads, requiring its own script_id config surface to model as a second stream
